scripts.dev: npx concurrently "cd client && npm run dev" "npx wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npx electron ."
scripts.dev:web: npx concurrently "cd server && npm start" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.dist: npm run build:client && npx electron-builder --win --publish never
scripts.dist:portable: npm run build:client && npx electron-builder --win portable --publish never
